channel.title: Browsermobproxy on Make Things Happen
channel.description: Recent content in Browsermobproxy on Make Things Happen

item.title: Selenium + BrowserMobProxy to gather data from SSL secured websites like Facebook
item.description: Recently, Facebook decided to turn off access to public events. So now, if you are not an administrator of the page or if you don’t have an access to the page, you don’t have access to its events, even though they are public. Here is the bug for it.
